paragraph.content: the amount of the alcohol fuel credit determined with respect to the taxpayer for the taxable year under section 40(a),
the biodiesel fuels credit determined with respect to the taxpayer for the taxable year under section 40A(a), and
the sustainable aviation fuel credit determined with respect to the taxpayer for the taxable year under section 40B(a).

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2004—Pub. L. 108–357 amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Gross income includes the amount of the alcohol fuel credit determined with respect to the taxpayer for the taxable year under section 40(a).”

1984—Pub. L. 98–369 amended section generally, substituting “the amount of the alcohol fuel credit determined with respect to the taxpayer for the taxable year under section 40(a)” for “an amount equal to the amount of the credit allowable to the taxpayer under section 44E for the taxable year (determined without regard to subsection (e) thereof)”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2022 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 117–169 applicable to fuel sold or used after Dec. 31, 2022, see section 13203(f) of Pub. L. 117–169, set out as an Effective Date note under section 40B of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2004 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 108–357 applicable to fuel produced, and sold or used, after Dec. 31, 2004, in taxable years ending after such date, see section 302(d) of Pub. L. 108–357, set out as a note under section 38 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1984 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 98–369 applicable to taxable years beginning after Dec. 31, 1983, and to carrybacks from such years, see section 475(a) of Pub. L. 98–369, set out as a note under section 21 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable to sales or uses after Sept. 30, 1980, in taxable years ending after such date, see section 232(h)(1) of Pub. L. 96–223, set out as a note under section 40 of this title.
